paragraphs.text:
%md

s12,s3t, and s3a are the three streams.sink.topic.cypher scripts build a dimension of GraphDB.
s12 differs from s3t and s3a as it records the actual dimension (degree).  s3t and s3a record dimension as the n+1 dimension. 

These are the ZADScripts.ScriptsAutomation methods and their associated streams.sink topics:

public void s12Dc(String degreeConst, String rangeLow,String rangeHigh,String index,String dimensionRead1,String dimensionRead2,
                  String writeDimension, int tConstraint) throws JsonProcessingException  {

        MATCH (v:VertexNode {Degree:?})<-[vI:VertexIndexedBy {twoSeq:?}]-(i:IndexedBy {N:N,MaxN:nMax,Dimension:?})-[]->(e:Evaluate)
        WITH i.N as iN, i.MaxN as iM,e,v,vI,i                        \n" +
        OPTIONAL MATCH (vv:VertexNode)<-[vII:VertexIndexedBy]-(ii:IndexedByArgument)-[]->(ee:Evaluate {Value:toString(vI.twoSeq)})      
                        where ii.MaxN=iM  AND ii.Dimension=?

        These dimension arguments are same valued.

        streams.sink.topic.cypher.s12=Create (aN:ArgumentsNode { TDegree:event.TTDegree, TScalar:event.TTScalar, TDivisor:event.vDivisor, ADivisor:event.vvDivisor,ATwoSeq:event.vvTwoSeq,ADegree:event.AADegree,AScalar:event.AAScalar,DegreeSum:event.degreeSum,ScalarProduct:event.scalarProduct,ResultDivisor:event.resultDivisor }) \
        Merge (cl:CollectedProductArgNode {Dimension:event.writeDimension,MaxN:event.iM,N:event.iN,Divisor:event.pD,afe:event.p2Eval,tft:toInteger(event.vTwoSeq)}) \
        Merge (cl) - [:Arguments] -> (aN)


public void s3TEc(String rangeLow, String rangeHigh, String nMax, String dimension1, String dimension2, String dimension3, 
                  int tConstraint) throws JsonProcessingException  {

        MATCH (cl:CollectedProductArgNode {Dimension:?,MaxN:iM,N:iN,tft:?})-[:Arguments]->(aN:ArgumentsNode )
        WITH max(aN.ResultDivisor) AS maxDivisor,iN,iM
        MATCH (cl:CollectedProductArgNode {Dimension:?,MaxN:iM,N:iN,tft:?})-[:Arguments]->(aN:ArgumentsNode )

        The write dimension is read dimension + 1.

	streams.sink.topic.cypher.s3t=CREATE (v:VertexNode {Scalar:event.tScalar,Degree:toString(event.tDegree)} ) \
	MERGE (i:IndexedBy {N:event.iN,RowCounter:event.eTrm,MaxN:event.iM,Dimension:event.dimension} ) \
	MERGE (e:Evaluate {Value:toString(toInteger(2^toInteger(event.iN)))}) \
	MERGE (i) -[:IndexedByEvaluate]->(e) \
	MERGE (i)-[eee:VertexIndexedBy {twoSeq:event.eTrm, divisor:event.pTD}]->(v)



public void s3ADc(String rangeLow, String rangeHigh, String nMax, String dimension1, String dimension2, String dimension3,
                  int tConstraint, String dConstraint) throws JsonProcessingException  {

        MATCH (v:VertexNode {Degree:?})<-[vI:VertexIndexedBy]-(i:IndexedBy {N:iN,MaxN:iM,Dimension:?})
        WITH iN, iM, max(vI.divisor) as maxDivisor
        MATCH (v:VertexNode {Degree:?})<-[vI:VertexIndexedBy]-(i:IndexedBy {N:iN,MaxN:iM,Dimension:?})

        The read dimension and write dimension are the same.

	streams.sink.topic.cypher.s3a=CREATE (v:VertexNode {Scalar:event.tScalar,Degree:toString(event.tDegree)}) \
	MERGE (e:Evaluate {Value:toString(toInteger(2^toInteger(event.iN)))}) \
	MERGE (i:IndexedByArgument {N:event.iN,MaxN:event.iM,Dimension:event.dimension} ) \
	MERGE (i) -[:IndexedByEvaluate]->(e) \
	MERGE (i)-[eee:VertexIndexedBy {twoSeq:“99”, divisor:event.pTD}]->(v)

msg.data:
s12,s3t, and s3a are the three streams.sink.topic.cypher scripts build a dimension of GraphDB.
s12 differs from s3t and s3a as it records the actual dimension (degree). s3t and s3a record dimension as the n+1 dimension.

These are the ZADScripts.ScriptsAutomation methods and their associated streams.sink topics:

public void s12Dc(String degreeConst, String rangeLow,String rangeHigh,String index,String dimensionRead1,String dimensionRead2,
String writeDimension, int tConstraint) throws JsonProcessingException {

    MATCH (v:VertexNode {Degree:?})<-[vI:VertexIndexedBy {twoSeq:?}]-(i:IndexedBy {N:N,MaxN:nMax,Dimension:?})-[]->(e:Evaluate)
    WITH i.N as iN, i.MaxN as iM,e,v,vI,i                        \n" +
    OPTIONAL MATCH (vv:VertexNode)<-[vII:VertexIndexedBy]-(ii:IndexedByArgument)-[]->(ee:Evaluate {Value:toString(vI.twoSeq)})      
                    where ii.MaxN=iM  AND ii.Dimension=?

    These dimension arguments are same valued.

    streams.sink.topic.cypher.s12=Create (aN:ArgumentsNode { TDegree:event.TTDegree, TScalar:event.TTScalar, TDivisor:event.vDivisor, ADivisor:event.vvDivisor,ATwoSeq:event.vvTwoSeq,ADegree:event.AADegree,AScalar:event.AAScalar,DegreeSum:event.degreeSum,ScalarProduct:event.scalarProduct,ResultDivisor:event.resultDivisor }) \
    Merge (cl:CollectedProductArgNode {Dimension:event.writeDimension,MaxN:event.iM,N:event.iN,Divisor:event.pD,afe:event.p2Eval,tft:toInteger(event.vTwoSeq)}) \
    Merge (cl) - [:Arguments] -> (aN)

public void s3TEc(String rangeLow, String rangeHigh, String nMax, String dimension1, String dimension2, String dimension3,
int tConstraint) throws JsonProcessingException {

    MATCH (cl:CollectedProductArgNode {Dimension:?,MaxN:iM,N:iN,tft:?})-[:Arguments]->(aN:ArgumentsNode )
    WITH max(aN.ResultDivisor) AS maxDivisor,iN,iM
    MATCH (cl:CollectedProductArgNode {Dimension:?,MaxN:iM,N:iN,tft:?})-[:Arguments]->(aN:ArgumentsNode )

    The write dimension is read dimension + 1.

streams.sink.topic.cypher.s3t=CREATE (v:VertexNode {Scalar:event.tScalar,Degree:toString(event.tDegree)} ) \
MERGE (i:IndexedBy {N:event.iN,RowCounter:event.eTrm,MaxN:event.iM,Dimension:event.dimension} ) \
MERGE (e:Evaluate {Value:toString(toInteger(2^toInteger(event.iN)))}) \
MERGE (i) -[:IndexedByEvaluate]->(e) \
MERGE (i)-[eee:VertexIndexedBy {twoSeq:event.eTrm, divisor:event.pTD}]->(v)

public void s3ADc(String rangeLow, String rangeHigh, String nMax, String dimension1, String dimension2, String dimension3,
int tConstraint, String dConstraint) throws JsonProcessingException {

    MATCH (v:VertexNode {Degree:?})<-[vI:VertexIndexedBy]-(i:IndexedBy {N:iN,MaxN:iM,Dimension:?})
    WITH iN, iM, max(vI.divisor) as maxDivisor
    MATCH (v:VertexNode {Degree:?})<-[vI:VertexIndexedBy]-(i:IndexedBy {N:iN,MaxN:iM,Dimension:?})

    The read dimension and write dimension are the same.

streams.sink.topic.cypher.s3a=CREATE (v:VertexNode {Scalar:event.tScalar,Degree:toString(event.tDegree)}) \
MERGE (e:Evaluate {Value:toString(toInteger(2^toInteger(event.iN)))}) \
MERGE (i:IndexedByArgument {N:event.iN,MaxN:event.iM,Dimension:event.dimension} ) \
MERGE (i) -[:IndexedByEvaluate]->(e) \
MERGE (i)-[eee:VertexIndexedBy {twoSeq:“99”, divisor:event.pTD}]->(v)

paragraphs.title: DELETE D8 script 1 created nodes.
paragraphs.text:
%neo4j                                          // what are ProductArgsNodes???   They are relics and not on QuippyDB
MATCH  (p:ProductArgsNode {Dimension:"8"})
DETACH DELETE p

paragraphs.title: DELETE D8 script 2 created nodes.
paragraphs.text:
%neo4j
//MATCH (cl:CollectedProductArgNode {Dimension:'8',MaxN:'10000'}) - [:Arguments] -> (aN:ArgumentsNode)
MATCH (cl:CollectedProductArgNode {Dimension:'16'}) - [:Arguments] -> (aN:ArgumentsNode)
DETACH DELETE cl,aN
RETURN COUNT(cl),COUNT(aN)

table.tableOptionSpecHash: [{"name":"useFilter","valueType":"boolean","defaultValue":false,"widget":"checkbox","description":"Enable filter for columns"},{"name":"showPagination","valueType":"boolean","defaultValue":false,"widget":"checkbox","description":"Enable pagination for better navigation"},{"name":"showAggregationFooter","valueType":"boolean","defaultValue":false,"widget":"checkbox","description":"Enable a footer for displaying aggregated values"}]

paragraphs.title: DELETE D8 script 3 Target created nodes.
paragraphs.text:
%neo4j
//MATCH  (i:IndexedBy {Dimension:"16",MaxN:'10000'} ) -[eee:VertexIndexedBy]->(v)
MATCH  (i:IndexedBy {Dimension:"16"} ) -[eee:VertexIndexedBy]->(v)
DETACH DELETE i,v
RETURN COUNT(i),COUNT(v)

table.tableOptionSpecHash: [{"name":"useFilter","valueType":"boolean","defaultValue":false,"widget":"checkbox","description":"Enable filter for columns"},{"name":"showPagination","valueType":"boolean","defaultValue":false,"widget":"checkbox","description":"Enable pagination for better navigation"},{"name":"showAggregationFooter","valueType":"boolean","defaultValue":false,"widget":"checkbox","description":"Enable a footer for displaying aggregated values"}]

paragraphs.title: DELETE D8 script 3 Argument created nodes.
paragraphs.text:
%neo4j
MATCH  (ii:IndexedByArgument {Dimension:"16",MaxN:'10000'} )-[eee:VertexIndexedBy]->(vv)
DETACH DELETE ii,vv
RETURN COUNT(ii),COUNT(vv)

table.tableOptionSpecHash: [{"name":"useFilter","valueType":"boolean","defaultValue":false,"widget":"checkbox","description":"Enable filter for columns"},{"name":"showPagination","valueType":"boolean","defaultValue":false,"widget":"checkbox","description":"Enable pagination for better navigation"},{"name":"showAggregationFooter","valueType":"boolean","defaultValue":false,"widget":"checkbox","description":"Enable a footer for displaying aggregated values"}]

paragraphs.text:
%neo4j
CREATE INDEX ON :IndexedBy(N,MaxN)
CREATE INDEX ON :Evaluate(Value)
CREATE INDEX ON :TwoSeqFactor(twoSeq)
CREATE INDEX ON :CollectedProductArgNode(MaxN,N)
CREATE INDEX ON :IndexedByArgument(N,MaxN)
